creator: robertjenssen@ozemail.com.au
text:
In /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3 , "make" fails with:

Running processes: 1

-------------

mkdir ./unxfbsdi.pro/misc/build/cppunit-1.8.0/

mkdir: ./unxfbsdi.pro/misc/build/cppunit-1.8.0/: File exists

cd ./unxfbsdi.pro/misc/build/cppunit-1.8.0/ && dmake -P1   && touch /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO300_m15/cppunit/./unxfbsdi.pro/misc/build/so_built_so_cppunit

cd src/win32 && dmake -P1 -P1 

-------------

cd src/result && dmake -P1 -P1 

------------------------------
